## Problem

A clear description of the problem or use case (e.g. "I always need to...").

## Proposed solution

What you would like to see (e.g. new endpoint, config option, behavior).

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional context

Screenshots, examples, or references if applicable.
